title: hieracium vulgatum subsp. friesii
intro: Hieracium vulgatum subsp. friesii is a subspecies of the hawkweed plant, a perennial herb belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its astringent, antiseptic, and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant is valued for its health benefits, including its ability to reduce fever, soothe digestive issues, and alleviate respiratory problems. Hieracium vulgatum subsp. friesii can be prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture, and is also used in topical applications to promote wound healing and skin health.
